specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Welcome to Ben's Boatworks, a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services built around what boat owners actually need — honest work, done right, with the kind of attention your boat deserves.

At Ben's Boatworks, our core specialties cover the full spectrum of vessel care. We handle Boat Surveying and Inspection for buyers, sellers, and insurance purposes, giving you a clear picture of a vessel's true condition. Our Diving and Underwater Services keep your hull, running gear, and through-hulls clean and functioning without the hassle of a haul-out. When the heat gets serious, our Marine AC and Climate Control work ensures your onboard systems are cooling efficiently and reliably. And with Marine Plumbing and Sanitation services, we tackle everything from holding tank issues to freshwater system repairs — the unglamorous stuff that matters a lot when you're out on the water.

We serve boat owners throughout South Florida and the surrounding coastal communities, working within a 60-mile radius to bring dependable marine service directly to where your boat lives. Whether you're docked in Annapolis or cruising the Chesapeake Bay region, we understand that your boat represents a significant investment — and we treat it that way. Our commitment is straightforward: show up prepared, communicate clearly, and get the job done properly the first time.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, underwater diving services, marine AC & plumbing. Serving South Florida — call today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A thorough boat survey covers the structural integrity, mechanical systems, electrical components, and overall condition of a vessel — giving buyers, sellers, and insurers an accurate, documented assessment. Whether you need a pre-purchase inspection or an insurance survey, having a qualified marine surveyor evaluate the boat can save you from costly surprises down the road.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Underwater diving services allow for hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, and running gear maintenance without the time and expense of hauling the vessel out of the water. Regular underwater inspections help catch fouling, corrosion, and damage to through-hulls or shafts before they turn into serious — and expensive — problems.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Marine air conditioning systems require specialized knowledge of refrigerant handling, raw water cooling circuits, and onboard electrical loads that differ significantly from residential HVAC work. Proper installation, routine maintenance, and timely repairs keep climate control systems running efficiently and prevent breakdowns during the hottest months of boating season.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Marine plumbing and sanitation work covers freshwater systems, raw water intakes, holding tanks, marine heads, and all associated hoses, valves, and through-hull fittings that keep a vessel's onboard systems functioning safely. Properly maintained sanitation systems are essential for both regulatory compliance and the comfort of everyone aboard.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection for prospective buyers
Hull cleaning and zinc replacement via underwater diving without haul-out
Marine air conditioning system installation, repair, and seasonal maintenance
Holding tank and marine head repair or full sanitation system replacement
Insurance survey documentation for vessel coverage or policy renewal
Through-hull inspection and underwater running gear assessment
Freshwater system troubleshooting and marine plumbing repairs aboard vessels
